hooks.command: if [ -e .claude ] && [ ! -d .claude ]; then echo '{"_error":"Invalid .claude path"}'; exit 1; fi; if [ -L .claude ] || [ -L .claude/sessions.json ]; then echo '{"_error":"Refusing symlinked sessions.json"}'; exit 1; fi; if [ ! -f .claude/sessions.json ]; then umask 077 && mkdir -p .claude && tmp="$(mktemp .claude/.sessions.XXXXXX)" && printf '%s\n' '{"_schema_version":"1.0","_hint":"Track SESSION_IDs here. Do not store secrets or tokens.","tasks":{}}' >"$tmp" && mv "$tmp" .claude/sessions.json; fi; if command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then jq empty .claude/sessions.json >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '{"_error":"Invalid sessions.json"}'; exit 1; }; elif command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then python3 -c 'import json,sys;json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))' .claude/sessions.json >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo '{"_error":"Invalid sessions.json"}'; exit 1; }; else echo '{"_error":"No JSON validator available (install jq or python3)"}'; exit 1; fi; cat .claude/sessions.json
